name: Aykah Image Prompt Pattern (v10 Collected Lived-In)

principles.core_rule: It must feel like a real home photograph, not a render.
principles.defining_diff: controlled imperfection + lighting specificity + anti-AI constraints + layered tonal contrast
principles.brand_color_policy: IGNORED in image generation. Brand palette (Navy #363B57, Ivory #FAF8F4, Gold #B8956A) is graphic-design-only. Use earthy neutrals by default. Apply brand colors only when user explicitly requests them in the prompt.
principles.v10_register: Collected Lived-In (v0.15.5): cream/oatmeal base + deep muted earth-tone accents (olive/chocolate/burgundy/mustard/rust/sage) + mixed WOVEN textures (velvet + linen + wool flat-weave + matte cotton — KNIT FAMILY BANNED in decor) + EXACTLY ONE patterned lumbar pillow + ONE dark anchor (art OR furniture OR architecture) + EXACTLY ONE wall art piece (no florals/botanicals) + furniture contrast (one piece darker than sofa) + DEEP-PILE COZY PLAIN RUG only (plush cut-pile wool — NO flat / NO jute / NO traditional patterns / NO knit) + EXACTLY ONE plant total + SPACIOUS breathing-room composition (no cramped). Never monotone, never bright/saturated, never knit-decor, never flat rugs, never patterned rugs.

room_variants_v0_16_0.rule: Pick ONE variant per scene based on hero product's style_tags + materials. Never blend two variants. Variant DNA overrides global rules where variant declares; global rules apply elsewhere.

A_bright_coastal.default_for: modern curved boucle sofa/sectional, light boucle accent chair, light-oak coffee/side tables
A_bright_coastal.wall_art_subject: gestural abstract ink-wash (cream + black), matte black thin frame
A_bright_coastal.light_fixture: daylight only OR matte black sconce
A_bright_coastal.pillow_accents: cream + oatmeal + 1 olive or chocolate velvet
A_bright_coastal.throw: cream linen-mohair flat blend OR none
A_bright_coastal.greenery: substantial olive tree (~1.5m) in cream stoneware floor pot

B_warm_walnut_classic.default_for: walnut wood-frame piece, dark walnut coffee/side tables, walnut accent chairs
B_warm_walnut_classic.coffee_table: dark walnut fluted drum OR live-edge slab
B_warm_walnut_classic.wall_art_subject: moody charcoal-toned landscape (cliff / horizon), thin warm-wood frame
B_warm_walnut_classic.pillow_accents: cream + oatmeal + olive velvet + chocolate velvet (2 deep accents)
B_warm_walnut_classic.throw: olive woven flat-weave OR brushed wool herringbone
B_warm_walnut_classic.greenery: ONE — substantial olive tree OR tall fresh branches

C_editorial_paneled.default_for: vintage-classic upholstered, bookshelves, credenzas, tufted/skirted classic
C_editorial_paneled.walls: white wainscot lower 1/3 + slim picture rail + warm cream above
C_editorial_paneled.coffee_table: dark walnut fluted nesting tables (round, two-tier)
C_editorial_paneled.wall_art_subject: matched 3-piece thin-frame landscape gallery (counts as ONE unit), thin black metal frames
C_editorial_paneled.light_fixture: picture lights above gallery OR matte black sconce
C_editorial_paneled.pillow_accents: cream + oatmeal + chocolate velvet + earth-tone patterned lumbar (faded kilim)
C_editorial_paneled.greenery: tall fresh branches (eucalyptus / willow) in cream stoneware floor vase
C_editorial_paneled.composition_bias: symmetric on gallery wall, sectional centered

D_coffered_open.default_for: spacious open-concept lifestyle scenes, light-oak coffee tables in open floor plans
D_coffered_open.coffee_table: matte black round / oval (the dark anchor itself)
D_coffered_open.wall_art_subject: cream + black tonal abstract color-field, thin warm-wood frame
D_coffered_open.light_fixture: coffered ceiling visible OR matte black chandelier
D_coffered_open.pillow_accents: cream + oatmeal + 1 sage-green velvet + chocolate velvet
D_coffered_open.greenery: tall fresh branches in cream stoneware floor vase
D_coffered_open.composition_bias: wide, open-concept, kitchen visible in distance

E_intimate_corner.default_for: moody / smaller pieces, MCM accent chairs, intimate single-piece heroes
E_intimate_corner.walls: warm cream limewash slightly moodier tonal variation
E_intimate_corner.wall_art_subject: ONE moody dark figurative painting (brown-toned animal, sepia), thin warm-wood frame
E_intimate_corner.pillow_accents: oatmeal + 1 chocolate velvet + 1 rust velvet + earth-tone patterned lumbar
E_intimate_corner.throw: cream waffle-weave flat OR linen-mohair (NOT chunky knit)
E_intimate_corner.greenery: deep rust-red dried berry branches in cream urn

F_editorial_classic.default_for: slim classic upholstered loveseats/sofas (Calia, Aria), travertine table products
F_editorial_classic.wall_art_subject: sepia / muted-tone botanical-leaf print (single leaf branch in matte brown / cream), matte black thin frame. NOTE: only variant that allows botanical subject; strictly muted brown leaves, NEVER colorful flowers / bouquets.
F_editorial_classic.light_fixture: matte black arc floor lamp (architectural anchor)
F_editorial_classic.pillow_accents: cream + oatmeal + olive velvet + chocolate textured woven cotton + olive-stripe patterned lumbar
F_editorial_classic.throw: olive woven flat-weave with subtle fringe
F_editorial_classic.greenery: ONE eucalyptus branch in small cream stoneware floor vase
F_editorial_classic.composition_bias: symmetric, sectional centered to wall art above

G_moody_cinematic_cozy.default_for: deep velvet sofas, large dark-fabric sectionals, moody-tone upholstery, RH Modern / Soho House heavy upholstered pieces
G_moody_cinematic_cozy.walls: warm taupe-brown limewash plaster (deep, saturated, moody)
G_moody_cinematic_cozy.floor: dark warm walnut OR rich amber-oak wide-plank
G_moody_cinematic_cozy.coffee_table: black slatted / reeded cylindrical drum (large, sculptural, in front of sofa)
G_moody_cinematic_cozy.wall_art_subject: warm-wood-frame, large abstract textural painting in cream + ochre / mustard / rust tones
G_moody_cinematic_cozy.light_fixture: cream cylindrical fabric shade on warm copper / wood base, LIT (visible warm glow source)
G_moody_cinematic_cozy.lighting_setup: multi-source — floor lamp glow + small window
G_moody_cinematic_cozy.pillow_accents: olive velvet + dark chocolate boucle + burgundy / wine velvet + warm taupe velvet — richer, deeper, slightly jewel-adjacent
G_moody_cinematic_cozy.throw: rich dark chocolate mohair / wool — fuzzier, draped heavier
G_moody_cinematic_cozy.greenery: ONE — substantial olive tree OR tall dried branches
G_moody_cinematic_cozy.time_of_day: late afternoon / early evening, low-key moody
G_moody_cinematic_cozy.composition_bias: more centered / front-on, sectional symmetric to wall art above
G_moody_cinematic_cozy.anti_register: NOT bright airy. NOT 5400K. NOT cool. NOT cream-walled. Must read MOODY.
global_rules_overridden: single window source camera-LEFT (variant uses multi-source — floor lamp + window)
warm-amber cast banned (variant inverts — warm-amber is the hero cast)
navy banned as room accent (variant allows navy as deep velvet accent)
cream walls (variant uses taupe-brown moody plaster)
light oak floor (variant uses dark walnut / amber-oak)
no chunky knit throws (variant allows mohair/wool fuzzier throw)

room_variants_v0_16_0.selection_rule: Read hero product's style_tags + materials from catalog. Match to one of 7 variants A-G. Print 'Room variant: <letter — name>' as first line of CREATIVE DIRECTION in scene plan. Apply variant DNA. Verify variant overrides ARE applied (e.g., G must say warm tungsten 3000-3500K not 5400K daylight). NEVER blend two variants.

angle_lock_v0_16_0.rule: User-picked angle is LITERAL. Never substitute, never soften, never blend.
angle_lock_v0_16_0.front: Hero faces camera straight on. Symmetric staging. Both arms / both legs visible. NO rotation off-axis. NO 3/4 interpretation. NO side glimpse.
angle_lock_v0_16_0.three_quarter: Hero rotated 30-45° from camera. Asymmetric. Both front face AND one side visible. Never pure front, never pure side.
angle_lock_v0_16_0.side: Profile. ONE side visible, NO front face. Show silhouette.
angle_lock_v0_16_0.back: Back visible without obstruction. NO front, side, 3/4 visible.
angle_lock_v0_16_0.closeup: Hero fills 70%+ of frame. Material/joinery detail. NO wide-room shot.
angle_lock_v0_16_0.cutout: Studio mode. Pure white seamless. NO room context.
angle_lock_v0_16_0.hero: Wide editorial. Full room visible. NO tight crop.

match_product_reference_image_v0_16_0.rule: Hero must match catalog primary_image EXACTLY — material, color, silhouette, leg style, proportions. Pass primary_image URL as reference image to engine. Never imagine variations.

decor_per_variant_v0_16_1_TRIAL.rule: Each variant now defines its own coffee table decor (3-4 objects) so every scene's coffee table reads visually different. Decor extends the variant's wood tone + pillow palette + wall finish. Replaces global stoneware+travertine+books default.

decor_by_variant.A_bright_coastal: Hand-thrown cream stoneware vase (small, empty or single sprig) + 2 plain cream/oat hardcover books stacked at slight angle + small honed-travertine catch dish — 3 objects max
decor_by_variant.B_warm_walnut_classic: Dark stoneware vessel with single dried-stem accent + 2 chocolate-spine plain hardcover books + brass-tipped candlestick pair (unlit during day) on small brass tray — 3-4 objects, layered warm-classic
decor_by_variant.C_editorial_paneled: Cream + black ceramic catch dish + small antique brass tray with 1 plain cream-spine book + small handheld stoneware vessel (empty) — 3 objects, editorial considered
decor_by_variant.D_coffered_open: Cream stoneware low bowl + small matte black candle on round travertine tray (unlit during day) + 1 plain cream hardcover book — 3 objects, open-airy
decor_by_variant.E_intimate_corner: Small ceramic incense burner (clay/stoneware, organic shape) + 1 chocolate-spine plain hardcover book + cream-glazed earthenware bowl + small brass dish — 3-4 objects, intimate textured
decor_by_variant.F_editorial_classic: Travertine catch dish + 2 plain cream/chocolate hardcover books stacked + small handheld stoneware vessel + small ceramic acorn or organic decorative object — 3-4 objects, classic considered
decor_by_variant.G_moody_cinematic_cozy: LIT warm copper / brass candle (visible warm glow) + 1 deep-burgundy-spine plain hardcover book + dark stoneware bowl with small dried-stem accent + small brass tray with amber-glass vessel — 4 objects, moody cinematic; lit candle = additional warm light source

global_caps: Max 4 objects on coffee table (3 ideal)
Texture triangulation: vessel + book + small object
Decor palette must match variant's wood tone, pillow accents, wall finish
Books plain solid covers, NO text (rule 9b global)
LIT candles ONLY in variant G; unlit decorative candles allowed in any variant

chandelier_decision_tree_v0_16_1_TRIAL.rule: Variant locks the primary fixture; this decision tree handles WHEN, SCALE, SECONDARY use, LIT vs UNLIT.

when_chandelier.D_conditional: Matte black chandelier when ceiling > 11ft, OR coffered ceiling visible when ceiling <= 10ft
when_chandelier.G_always: Cream cylindrical fabric shade on copper/wood base — variant-mandatory, always LIT
when_chandelier.A_C_E_F_never: Variant-locked elsewhere (sconce / picture lights / floor lamp / arc lamp / daylight only) — never replace with chandelier

chandelier_decision_tree_v0_16_1_TRIAL.scale_rule: Chandelier diameter (inches) ≈ (room width ft + room length ft) / 2. Hanging height: bottom 30-36in above coffee table OR 7ft above floor in conversation zones.

ceiling_height_rule.above_11ft: Chandelier proportional to ceiling height (taller OK)
ceiling_height_rule.9_to_11ft: Standard size, hung high enough to clear sightlines
ceiling_height_rule.below_9ft: Use sconce or floor lamp INSTEAD — never chandelier (would crowd)

chandelier_decision_tree_v0_16_1_TRIAL.secondary_fixture_rule: Variants A, C, E may add ONE small modern pendant or low-profile flush-mount (matte black, simple silhouette) ONLY if ceiling reads visually empty in wide-shot. Never chandelier as secondary. Never 2+ visible fixtures.

lit_vs_unlit.5400K_variants_A_B_C_D_E_F: UNLIT by default — daylight is dominant source, fixture is architectural/decorative
lit_vs_unlit.G_variant: LIT mandatory — fixture is the warm glow source, not just decorative

chandelier_decision_tree_v0_16_1_TRIAL.lit_candles_rule: ONLY in variant G coffee-table decor (warm copper / brass candle = part of cinematic glow). NEVER lit candles in bright-daylight variants.
hard_fails: Replace variant's locked primary fixture with different type
Use chandelier in variant A, C, E, F (variant-locked elsewhere)
Use chandelier when ceiling < 9ft (out of scale)
Use lit chandelier / lit lamp in 5400K bright-daylight scene (reads as fake interior render)

v10_living_room_dna.pillow_texture_minimum: 1 velvet + 1 linen-weave + 1 wool flat-weave or matte cotton (v0.15.2 — knit family BANNED in decor)
pillow_textures_banned: boucle pillow when sofa is boucle (no boucle-on-boucle)
v10_living_room_dna.boucle_pillow_rule: ONE boucle pillow allowed ONLY when catalog product (sofa/chair) is NOT boucle. NEVER stack boucle-on-boucle.
rugs_approved_deep_pile_cozy_plain_only: plush cut-pile wool rug (medium-to-high pile 1.5-2.5cm, dense, soft underfoot, plain solid cream / oatmeal / warm-greige) — DEFAULT
hand-tufted wool rug with subtle slub variation (plush, dense, ~2cm pile, plain)
hand-knotted wool rug with high cut pile (cream / oatmeal, plush ~2.5cm pile, plain)
mohair / cashmere wool blend rug (luxurious plush ~2cm pile, plain solid cream — premium)
rugs_banned_v0_15_5: hand-woven wool flatweave — RETIRED v0.15.5 (too flat, too thin)
jute / sisal-cotton blend — RETIRED v0.15.5 (too flat, too coarse)
vintage faded oriental / persian medallion / moroccan motif / southwestern stripe / tribal motif / kilim — RETIRED v0.15.4
cream loop-pile / berber chunky knit / cable-knit-style rugs (knit family)
cozy chunky knit / shaggy / shag-pile / sherpa rugs (knit family)
bright pattern, bold geometric, round rugs
v10_living_room_dna.rug_texture_target: deep-pile cozy — when described, the rug must read as 'you'd want to walk on this barefoot.' Plush, dense, soft. Cream-on-cream subtle tonal variation OK; never patterned, never knit-loops, never flat.
v10_living_room_dna.plant_count_rule: EXACTLY ONE plant TOTAL per scene — floor option (substantial olive tree / tall floor branches / dried floor urn) OR table option (small single-stem arrangement). Never both. Never multiple potted plants / herb pots / succulents / terrariums. Never mixed-flower bouquets.
v10_living_room_dna.spaciousness_rule: Spacious + breathing + considered. Hero owns its zone with 2-3 feet of breathing room. Coffee table 18-24 inches from sofa. Floor 50-70% visible. Walls 70%+ empty above dado line. Ceiling reads tall (12-foot feel). Negative space dominates composition.
cramped_space_failures_banned: pillows packed tight with no gaps
2+ accent chairs squeezed into same corner
decor stacked on every horizontal surface
multiple wall objects (art + mirror + sconce + shelf) on same wall
wide-angle shot of small room (compresses space)
patterned_pillow_approved_motifs: earthy block-print with widely-spaced muted motif
v10_living_room_dna.wall_art_exception: matched 3-piece gallery set (3 identical thin-frame landscapes in a row) counts as 1 unit

dark_anchor_options.A_wall_art_50pct: matte black framed abstract OR moody dark-toned figurative painting (~140cm x 100cm above sofa). Approved subjects: gestural abstract ink-wash / minimal line drawing / moody charcoal landscape (cliff/mountain/dunes/horizon, NOT floral fields) / brown-toned animal portrait (bison/horse/dog) / sepia or B&W photograph / tonal abstract color-field / stretched canvas with raw texture + minimal black mark-making. NEVER floral / botanical / watercolor-floral / sunset / pop-art / typography / family-photo / religious / sports / animal-print art.
dark_anchor_options.B_furniture_30pct: dark walnut credenza OR dark walnut fluted nesting tables OR matte black coffee table OR dark fluted reeded base — when used, wall art goes light/cream/subtle or omitted
dark_anchor_options.C_architectural_15pct: matte black sconces flanking subtle cream art OR matte black chandelier
dark_anchor_options.D_matched_gallery_5pct: 3-piece matched thin-frame landscape set in a row (counts as one unit)

dark_anchor_hard_rules: NEVER 2+ separate wall art pieces on the same wall
NEVER pair multiple dark-wood furniture pieces — one dark-wood note per scene
anchor must read as the visual gravitational center
florals_approved_modern: fresh white tulips in cream stoneware
tall fresh airy green branches (eucalyptus, willow, olive sprig)
deep rust-red dried berry branches in cream urn
tall dried fennel / feathery dried wildflower
florals_banned_vintage: heavy florals in ornate Victorian / chinoiserie / brass-handle vases

books_rule_living_room.cover_style: plain matte hardcover, solid muted-neutral tone (cream/oat/sage/chocolate/black)
books_rule_living_room.stacking: slight off-angle, NEVER aligned to edge, NEVER fanned open with visible text

v10_living_room_dna.books_rule_dining_bedroom: almost never — only when a human is using one in the scene
v10_living_room_dna.furniture_contrast_rule: at least ONE piece in the room must be a darker tone than the sofa (dark walnut coffee table / matte black coffee table / dark walnut credenza / dark fluted reeded base)

HERO_PRODUCT_LOCK.format: Use the exact [product type] provided. Do not change [shape / proportions / structure / material / texture]. Maintain [exact material + color from catalog.json]. No redesign, no resizing, no distortion.

REAL_HOME_ANCHOR.phrase: Must feel like a real home photograph, not a render or catalog.

vocabulary.palette_words_note: Descriptive only. NEVER use hex codes in prompts.
vocabulary.aykah_reference_set_note: Available as taste anchors when scene calls for them. Not forced.

scene_formula.light_direction: almost always side light from off-frame window
scene_formula.soft_formula: 1 hero object + 1 anchor furniture + 2-3 soft props + 1 light source + 1 natural light direction

ai_render_tells: no mirrored or perfectly symmetrical pillow placement
no perfectly folded throw blanket — one corner must be pulled loose
no books aligned perfectly parallel to coffee table edge — slight off-angle
no plant leaves in perfect radial symmetry — natural variation
no plastic-shine on any surface — matte natural finishes only
no rug edges aligned perfectly to floor planks
single believable light origin — no rim-lighting from impossible angles
no floating objects — every object makes solid contact with its surface
styling: no monotone same-tone scene — at least one element must contrast
no knit-family pillows — waffle / cable / sherpa / chunky / shaggy / mongolian BANNED in decor
no knit-family throws — chunky cable-knit / waffle / fringe / sherpa BANNED
no knit-family rugs — loop-pile / chunky knit / cable-knit-style / shag-pile / sherpa BANNED
no traditional-pattern rugs — oriental / persian medallion / moroccan motif / kilim / tribal / southwestern BANNED (v0.15.4)
no flat / flatweave / jute / sisal / low-pile rugs — must be plush deep-pile cozy (v0.15.5)
no boucle-on-boucle (boucle pillow on boucle sofa)
no 2+ plants in the scene — EXACTLY ONE plant total (v0.15.4)
no floor olive tree AND coffee-table flower vase together — pick one
no mixed-flower bouquets — single-stem or single-species only
no cramped spaces — coffee table 18-24in from sofa, walls 70%+ empty, floor 50-70% visible (v0.15.4)
no wide-angle compression of small rooms
no zero patterned pillow and no two patterned pillows — exactly one
objects: no live or dried plants beyond foliage in a single described vase
no 2+ separate wall art pieces on the same wall (matched 3-piece gallery exempt)
no floral paintings as wall art — no single bloom, no bouquet, no vase-of-flowers, no still-life with flowers
no botanical prints, no pressed-flower frames, no herbarium illustrations on walls
no watercolor florals as wall art (the AI default — explicitly out)
no vintage / Victorian floral oil paintings
no inspirational typography or quote prints
no family-photo / wedding-photo portraits as wall art
no animal-print / leopard / zebra patterned art
no books with visible titles, author names, publisher logos, or readable text
no dried wheat or dried lavender bunches
no ornate Victorian / chinoiserie / brass-handle vases
colors_banned: no powder blue, sky blue, cornflower
no millennial pink, dusty rose, blush
no saturated jewel tones — emerald, sapphire, ruby, amethyst

bedroom.lighting_fixture: fabric-shaded table lamp on one side

sofa_living_room.source: Derived — captures Benetha's essence + structure + vocabulary
sofa_living_room.anchor_furniture: warm walnut coffee table + 1 small side table
sofa_living_room.lighting_fixture: fabric-shaded table lamp on side table

product_styling.condition: softly creased, lived-in, not perfectly fluffed

dining.anchor_furniture: 4-6 matching dining chairs + sideboard or credenza on back wall
dining.lighting_fixture: warm pendant or chandelier above the table

product_styling.centerpiece: single ceramic bowl OR small stoneware tray
product_styling.chairs: varied angles — some pulled out, some tucked in, one rotated 10° off-axis

always_avoid: throws on chairs (it's a dining room, not a living room)

lounge_accent_chair.anchor_furniture: 1 small warm walnut side table + 1 floor lamp partial in frame

product_styling.throw: casually draped over back or arm

always_avoid: companion seating in frame (single chair only)

style_bible_short: Built on controlled imperfection and lighting realism. Strict product accuracy first, then warm modern organic environment using earthy neutrals only. Soft side daylight + warm secondary light, late afternoon or early evening mood. Composition off-center and editorial. Styling minimal and repeatable — vase, books, one small object. Aggressively excludes anything artificial, bright, overly polished, or staged. The defining rule: it must feel like a real home photograph, not a render.

iteration.rule: When boss's taste evolves, copy current to next, edit, update prompt-pattern.json. Never overwrite prior locked versions.

version_log.v9: monotone cream master pattern, 4-pillow knit stack, single black art frame (locked 2026-05-05)
version_log.v10: Collected Lived-In — adds deep-muted accents, mixed-texture pillows, exactly one patterned lumbar, expanded dark anchor (4 options), modern florals, plain-cover books, furniture contrast rule, AI-realism cues (locked 2026-05-06)
